steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty rate of 15% was incorrectly applied at higher rate
Submit formal claim with custodian referencing Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty entitlement
If initial claim denied, escalate to RBC's tax reclaim department with treaty documentation
